QA1000.name: PartialArrayContains
QA1000.description: Query uses ARRAY_CONTAINS with the the third argument set to true.
QA1000.message: Instead of ARRAY_CONTAINS, consider using EXISTS with a subquery, which may improve performance.

QA1001.name: DistinctAndJoin
QA1001.message: Instead of DISTINCT with a JOIN, consider using EXISTS with a subquery, which may improve performance.

QA1002.name: Contains
QA1002.message: If you are matching on a string prefix, consider using STARTSWITH.

QA1003.name: CaseInsensitiveStartsWithOrStringEquals
QA1003.description: Query uses case-insensitive string search functions STARTSWITH or StringEquals.
QA1003.message: Instead of case-insensitive string search, consider creating a computed property with LOWER on the string field, which may improve performance.

QA1004.name: CaseInsensitiveEndsWith
QA1004.message: Instead of case-insensitive ENDSWITH, consider creating a computed property with REVERSE on the string field, and use STARTSWITH for comparison, which may improve performance.

QA1005.name: GroupByComputedProperty
QA1005.description: Query uses deterministic scalar expressions in Group By clause.
QA1005.message: Instead of using scalar expressions in GROUP BY clause, consider creating computed properties of these expressions, which may improve performance.

QA1006.name: UpperLowerComparison
QA1006.description: Query uses Upper or Lower string comparison.
QA1006.message: Consider defining a computed property on the UPPER/LOWER function expression.

QA1007.name: GetCurrentDateTime
QA1007.message: Consider using GetCurrentDateTimeStatic instead of GetCurrentDateTime in the WHERE clause.

QA1008.name: GetCurrentTicks
QA1008.message: Consider using GetCurrentTicksStatic instead of GetCurrentTicks in the WHERE clause.

QA1009.name: GetCurrentTimestamp
QA1009.message: Consider using GetCurrentTimestampStatic instead of GetCurrentTimestamp in the WHERE clause.
